---
title: "CV"
author: "Your Name"
jobtitle: ""
address: "Department of Your Field, Example University, Example City, Country"
email: "jane.researcher@example.edu"
github: "janeresearcher"
web: "janeresearcher.example.org"
fontawesome: true
updated: true
keywords:
  - academic CV
  - Quarto
  - LaTeX

format:
  qkit-pdf: default
---

# Education

::: {.cv-entries}
- 2022 - Current | **School of Your Field**, Example University, Country \newline Ph.D. in Your Field
- 2017 - 2019 | **Department of Your Field**, Other University, Country \newline M.Sc. in Your Field
- 2012 - 2017 | **Faculty of Your Field**, Other University, Country \newline B.A. in Your Field
:::

# Publications

::: {.cv-publications}
1. Title of Your First Published Paper, 2026, with A. Coauthor and B. Coauthor. **Journal Name**, vol. 1, p. 1-50. [Link](https://example.org/paper1)
2. Title of Your Second Published Paper, 2025, with A. Coauthor. **Another Journal**, vol. 44, p. 100-150. [Link](https://example.org/paper2)
3. Title of Your Third Published Paper, 2025, with C. Coauthor and B. Coauthor. **Third Journal**, vol. 75, p. 200-230. [Link](https://example.org/paper3)
4. Title of Your Fourth Published Paper, 2024, with A. Coauthor. **Fourth Journal**, vol. 94, p. 300-330. [Link](https://example.org/paper4)
5. Title of Your Fifth Published Paper, 2023, with A. Coauthor and B. Coauthor. **Fifth Journal**, vol. 31, p. 400-420. [Link](https://example.org/paper5)
6. Title of Your Sixth Published Paper, 2021, with A. Coauthor. **Sixth Journal**, vol. 73, p. 500-525. [Link](https://example.org/paper6)
7. Title of Your Seventh Published Paper, 2020, with A. Coauthor and B. Coauthor. **Seventh Journal**, vol. 69, p. 600-625. [Link](https://example.org/paper7)
:::

# Working Papers

::: {.cv-publications}
1. Title of Your First Working Paper, 2026, with D. Coauthor and E. Coauthor.
2. Title of Your Second Working Paper, 2026, with D. Coauthor and E. Coauthor. Available at [SSRN](https://example.org/ssrn).
:::

# Work-in-Progress

::: {.cv-publications}
1. Title of an In-Progress Project, with D. Coauthor and E. Coauthor.
2. Title of Another In-Progress Project.
3. Title of a Third In-Progress Project, with F. Coauthor.
4. Title of a Fourth In-Progress Project, with A. Coauthor and B. Coauthor.
:::

# Statistical Software Packages

::: {.cv-publications}
1. firstpackage: One-line Description of What It Does, 2026. *R package version 0.1.0*. [Link](https://example.org/firstpackage)
2. secondpackage: One-line Description of What It Does, 2026. *R package version 0.1.0*. [Link](https://example.org/secondpackage)
:::

# Conferences and Workshops

- Conference A (City, 2026), Conference B (City, 2026), Conference C (City, 2026), Ph.D. Workshop (City, 2026), Workshop D (City, 2026), Workshop E (City, 2026), Joint Ph.D. Workshop (City, 2025), Conference F (City, 2024), Conference G (City, 2024), Conference H (City, 2024), Workshop I* (City, 2024), Workshop J (City, 2024), Doctoral Conference (City, 2023), Joint Ph.D. Workshop (City, 2023), Symposium A* (City, 2022), Symposium B* (City, 2022), Conference I* (Online, 2022), Symposium C* (Online, 2021), Conference J* (City, 2021), Annual Meeting* (Virtual, 2020), and Conference K* (City, 2019). \newline \hspace{1em} *\textit{Presentations by co-authors}

# Research Experience

- **School of Your Field**, Other University, Country

  ::: {.cv-entries gap="2.5pt"}
  - 2025 - Current | Visiting Researcher
  :::

- **School of Your Field**, Example University, Country

  ::: {.cv-entries gap="2.5pt"}
  - 2022 - Current | Postgraduate Researcher
  :::

- **Department of Your Field**, Earlier University, Country

  ::: {.cv-entries gap="2.5pt"}
  - 2017 - 2022 | Research Assistant
  :::

# Teaching Experience

- **Undergraduate** \textbf{\small as Teaching Assistant}

  ::: {.cv-entries gap="2.5pt"}
  - Fall 2025 | **First Course Name** \newline School of Your Field, Example University, Country
  - Spring 2025/26 | **Second Course Name** \newline School of Your Field, Example University, Country
  - Fall 2024/25 | **Third Course Name** \newline School of Your Field, Example University, Country
  :::

- **Undergraduate** \textbf{\small as Lecturer}

  ::: {.cv-entries gap="2.5pt"}
  - Fall 2020 | **Fourth Course Name** \newline Department of Your Field, Earlier University, Country
  :::

- **Graduate** \textbf{\small as Lecturer}

  ::: {.cv-entries gap="2.5pt"}
  - Fall 2022 | **Fifth Course Name** \newline Department of Your Field, Earlier University, Country
  - Spring 2021 | **Sixth Course Name** \newline Joint Certificate Program
  - Fall 2021/22 | **Seventh Course Name** \newline Department of Your Field, Earlier University, Country
  - Spring 2020 | **Eighth Course Name** \newline Department of Your Field, Earlier University, Country
  :::

# Grants and Scholarships

::: {.cv-entries}
- 2022 - Current | Name of Your Scholarship or Funding Source.
:::

# Other Academic Services

::: {.cv-keys}
- Referee | Journal A, Journal B, Journal C, and Journal D.
:::

# Languages

::: {.cv-keys}
- Language A | Native
- Language B | Fluent
:::

# Research Interests

A short comma-separated list of your research interests goes here, written as a single paragraph.

# References

::: {.cv-references}
::: {.referee}
**[Referee One, Ph.D.](https://example.org/referee-one)**\
Department of Your Field\
School of Your Field\
Some University\
Some Address, Country\
\Letter\ [r.one@example.org](mailto:r.one@example.org)
:::

::: {.referee}
**[Referee Two, Ph.D.](https://example.org/referee-two)**\
Department of Your Field\
School of Your Field\
Example University\
Some Address, Country\
\Letter\ [r.two@example.org](mailto:r.two@example.org)
:::
:::

::: {.cv-references}
::: {.referee}
**[Referee Three, Ph.D.](https://example.org/referee-three)**\
Department of Your Field\
Faculty of Your Field\
Earlier University\
Some Address, Country\
\Letter\ [r.three@example.org](mailto:r.three@example.org)
:::

::: {.referee}
**[Referee Four, Ph.D.](https://example.org/referee-four)**\
Department of Your Field\
Faculty of Your Field\
Earlier University\
Some Address, Country\
\Letter\ [r.four@example.org](mailto:r.four@example.org)
:::
:::

# Other

::: {.cv-keys}
- Nationality | Your Nationality
:::
